productDisplayName: Puma Men Navy Blue Striped Polo neck T-shirt
description: Style NoteThe German brand puma is known world over for their infusion of colour and minimalist styling into classic wardrobe staples. With its fine finishing and detailing this striped Polo neck T-shirt easily makes it to our wishlist for the Summer. Pair it with distressed denims and flip-flops for a rugged look or with track pants and sneakers for a workout.Product DetailsNavy with orange stripe polo neck T-shirt, pique knit, ribbed spread collar, short buttoned placket with gathers, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, applique on left front chest, brand badge on left hem, embroidered branding at back neck,  vented hemMaterials and Care100% cottonWash and iron inside outMachine wash warm Warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model(height 6'and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
